types.name: Sound
types.description: A playable audio object (SFX or Voice). Leaf node in the Actor-Mixer Hierarchy, contains AudioFileSource children.

types.name: Event
types.description: A trigger object in the Events Hierarchy. Contains Action children that define what happens when the Event is posted from the game engine.

types.name: Action
types.description: A child of an Event. Defines the operation (Play, Stop, Pause, Resume, etc.) and the Target object.

types.name: Bus
types.description: An audio bus in the Master-Mixer Hierarchy. Routes and mixes audio signals from Sound objects. Supports effects, metering, and ducking.

types.name: AuxBus
types.description: An auxiliary bus for send-based effects (reverb, delay). Receives audio via Game-Defined or User-Defined Auxiliary Sends.

types.name: ActorMixer
types.description: An organizational container in the Actor-Mixer Hierarchy. Groups Sound objects and provides shared property inheritance.

types.name: RandomSequenceContainer
types.description: A container that plays its children in random or sequential order. Supports looping, avoidance, and shuffle modes.

types.name: SwitchContainer
types.description: A container that selects which child to play based on a Switch Group or State Group value. Used for dynamic audio selection.

types.name: BlendContainer
types.description: A container that blends multiple children simultaneously based on blend tracks and RTPC parameters. Full WAAPI support in Wwise 2024.1+.

types.name: GameParameter
types.description: A real-time parameter control (RTPC) value that can be set from the game engine to drive property changes (Volume, Pitch, Filter, etc.).

types.name: SwitchGroup
types.description: A group of mutually exclusive Switch values. Used to drive Switch Container assignments. Set from game code.

types.name: Switch
types.description: A value within a Switch Group. Represents one branch of a Switch Container.

types.name: StateGroup
types.description: A group of mutually exclusive State values. Used for global state-based property changes (e.g., underwater, paused).

types.name: State
types.description: A value within a State Group. Can be associated with property overrides across the entire project.

types.name: Trigger
types.description: A game-side trigger used to drive Stinger playback in Music Switch/Playlist Containers.

types.name: SoundBank
types.description: A package of audio data and metadata loaded by the game engine at runtime. Auto-Defined SoundBanks are the default in Wwise 2022.1+.

types.name: AudioFileSource
types.description: A leaf object representing an imported audio file (.wav). Child of a Sound object.

types.name: Effect
types.description: An audio effect plugin instance (RoomVerb, Delay, Compressor, etc.) attached to a Sound or Bus via Effect slots.

types.name: Attenuation
types.description: Defines distance-based volume and filter curves. Referenced by Sound/Container objects for 3D spatialization.

types.name: Conversion
types.description: Defines audio conversion settings (sample rate, codec, quality) applied during SoundBank generation.

types.name: WorkUnit
types.description: An organizational unit in Wwise that maps to a .wwu file on disk. Each hierarchy has a Default Work Unit.

types.name: Folder
types.description: A virtual folder for organizing objects within a Work Unit. Does not affect audio behavior.

types.name: MusicSwitchContainer
types.description: An interactive music container that switches between Music Segments based on Switch/State values.

types.name: MusicPlaylistContainer
types.description: An interactive music container that plays Music Segments in a defined playlist (sequential, random, or shuffle).

types.name: MusicSegment
types.description: A timed music structure containing Music Tracks. Defines entry/exit cues for transitions.

types.name: MusicTrack
types.description: A track within a Music Segment containing Music Clips. Supports sub-tracks for random/sequence switching.
